name: nope-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins by N-O-P-E — browser automation, cloud setup, and developer tools

plugins.name: gcp-setup
plugins.description: Automates Google Cloud Console setup via browser. Walks through project creation, API enabling, service accounts, IAM, billing, OAuth, Cloud Run, and firewall config — click by click. Auto-detects requirements from your codebase when invoked mid-feature.

plugins.name: search-console
plugins.description: Audits Google Search Console via browser automation. Surfaces indexing issues, sitemap gaps, Core Web Vitals, structured data errors, and merchant listing problems — then gives actionable fixes.
